description_te: బాలింతలకు ₹1,000 కొత్త బట్టలు + KIT. Delivery అయిన 24 గంటలలో Anganwadi worker ద్వారా delivery.
description_en: ₹1,000 worth clothes + kit for new mothers. Delivered by Anganwadi worker within 24 hours of delivery.

eligibility_criteria.registration: Must be registered at Anganwadi center
eligibility_criteria.institution_delivery: Must deliver at government hospital / PHC

benefit_amount: Kit worth ₹1,000 (new clothes for mother and baby + essential items)
application_process_te:
1. Government hospital లో delivery
2. Hospital Anganwadi worker కి inform
3. 24 గంటలలో kit delivery
4. ప్రత్యేక apply అవసరం లేదు
